headline: Union Pacific Corporation (UNP): Billionaire Seth Klarman Likes This Railroad Stock
summary: Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) is one of the 15 Best Stocks to Buy According to Billionaire Seth Klarman. Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP) is a recent addition to the 13F portfolio of Baupost Group. The fund owned a stake in the railroad firm back in the second quarter of 2023, but disposed of it in the […]

headline: Union Pacific rolls out Trump locomotive, U.S. 250th diesel
summary: Union Pacific unveiled specially-painted locomotives honoring the United States semiquincentennial and President Trump as it marks the 250th anniversary of U.S. independence. The post Union Pacific rolls out Trump locomotive, U.S. 250th diesel appeared first on FreightWaves.
